name: harness
description: Harness Architect for Codex. Designs project-specific harnesses, defines reusable subagent roles, and generates repo-local skills using codex-harness-100 as a reference library when available.

interface.shortDescription: Design and scaffold Codex-native project harnesses
interface.longDescription: Analyze the current repository, choose a collaboration pattern, define specialist roles, and scaffold AGENTS.md, repo-local skills, and Codex subagent configs. Reuse codex-harness-100 patterns when a close reference exists.
